overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city plaza at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and pedestrians with glowing umbrellas. The scene transitions from an open plaza with a central cylindrical tower to a waterfront promenade lined with palm trees and digital billboards.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a pedestrian carrying a glowing yellow umbrella passing by on the right. The camera moves forward through a rain-soaked futuristic plaza flanked by glass office towers with green-lit windows, approaching a central cylindrical tower displaying holographic advertisements.

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the central cylindrical tower under an overhead grid of glowing cyan panels. The tower's holographic display shifts colors from yellow to pink and red. A pedestrian with a red umbrella stands near the tower as the camera moves past illuminated planter beds.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm trees approaching water feature

slowing slightly while approaching the water feature edge

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the central tower, the camera moves toward a palm-lined area featuring a large water pool with glowing cyan edges. A pedestrian with a blue illuminated umbrella walks alongside the water as the scene opens up to show tall digital billboards in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with digital billboards and atmospheric mist

events.description: entering the enclosed waterfront walkway alongside the illuminated pool
entering a misty area with green spotlights visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of the illuminated water feature, passing digital billboards and other pedestrians

atmospheric fog hovering over the water and walkway
glowing cyan light strips along the water feature edge

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the edge of the illuminated water feature through a more enclosed promenade. Large digital billboards on the left display motorcycle advertisements while atmospheric mist gathers in the distance. The walkway feels narrower as buildings close in on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk plaza that gradually transitions into a narrow, neon-lit waterfront promenade. It begins by moving past a pedestrian with a glowing yellow umbrella and through a corridor of green-lit glass towers toward a central cylindrical tower. As the camera circles this tower under a grid of cyan panels, the holographic displays shift from yellow to pink and red while passing a figure with a red umbrella and illuminated planter beds. The scene then opens up as the camera turns away from the tower toward a palm-lined area, following a pedestrian with a blue umbrella along a water pool with glowing cyan edges. Finally, the view shifts into a more enclosed promenade where the walkway narrows between towering buildings and large digital billboards advertising motorcycles amidst a gathering atmospheric mist.
